debug_info.goal:

hα : OracleComp.SampleableType α
x : Bool
⊢ x ∈
    support
      (@OracleComp.HasUniformSelect!.uniformSelect! (Vector Bool 2) Bool (OracleComp.hasUniformSelectVector Bool 1)
        #v[true, false])

failed_attempts: cases x <;> simp [HasUniformSelect!.uniformSelect!] <;> exact ⟨_, rfl⟩
cases x <;> simp [hasUniformSelectVector]

cases x <;> simp [hasUniformSelectVector] <;> exact ⟨_, rfl⟩
